macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: BITmarkets Releases Crypto Outlook for 2026
items.summary: BITmarkets published its January 2026 report analyzing cryptocurrency market conditions, noting Bitcoin remains in the $60,000–$70,000 range, down over 30% year-on-year. The report identifies regulatory clarity as a positive force while citing macroeconomic uncertainty and geopolitical tensions as headwinds, with multiple possible outcomes for Bitcoin in 2026 including range-bound trading or renewed acceleration.

items.title: BTC & ETH Technical Analysis - March 1, 2026
items.summary: Bitcoin broke below its daily VWAP with bearish engulfing signals, while Ethereum pushed above $2,000 but faces resistance at the Fibonacci 0.618 level. Both assets show weekly oversold conditions with bullish divergences building underneath, suggesting potential for volatile snapbacks despite current downward pressure.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AI reveals hidden chemical changes across the Alzheimer's brain
items.summary: Rice University scientists used laser-based imaging combined with machine learning to create the first dye-free molecular atlas of an Alzheimer's brain, discovering that chemical changes spread unevenly across the brain and extend beyond amyloid plaques, suggesting Alzheimer's is a whole-brain metabolic disruption.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Marathon Server Slam Live Until March 3rd
items.summary: Bungie's revival of the Marathon franchise is offering free access to a 'server slam' playtest until 5am on March 3rd. The PvPvE extraction shooter launches March 6th on PlayStation 5, PC, and Xbox Series X|S.

items.title: Major Video Game Releases Coming This Week
items.summary: Multiple notable titles are launching in early March 2026, including Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered and Scott Pilgrim EX on March 3rd, followed by Marathon on March 6th and several other releases throughout the month.

items.title: Invincible Season 4 Coming to Prime Video in March
items.summary: Amazon Prime Video is releasing season 4 of the animated superhero series Invincible this month, featuring Mark Grayson taking a more active role against the Viltrumite Empire with new storylines not in the original comics.

items.title: Pokémon Pokopia Dominates Switch 2 Pre-loads
items.summary: Pokémon Pokopia is leading Nintendo Switch 2 eShop charts on March 1st, 2026, beating out competition with pre-load numbers alone.

items.title: Outward 2 Offers Unique Open-World Experience
items.summary: The long-awaited sequel Outward 2 is releasing in 2026 as a distinctive open-world RPG that prioritizes exploration and emergent storytelling, offering a different experience from major releases like Crimson Desert and GTA 6.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Anker Innovations Unveils Next-Generation Consumer Tech at MWC 2026
items.summary: Anker Innovations debuted key products at MWC 2026, including the Anker Nano Charger (45W with Smart Display and 180° foldable design in Cosmic Orange) and the Anker Prime Wireless Charging Station (3-in-1). These launches highlight advancements in portable and wireless charging technology.

items.title: James Altucher Spotlights Quiet Player Behind Starlink's Expansion
items.summary: Recognized as 'Tech Guru of the Year,' James Altucher delivered a briefing on Starlink's rapid evolution in satellite internet, highlighting a lesser-known company and its ripple effects across sectors like manufacturing and logistics.
